params.name: Nature Vol.1
params.description:
On Nov 4, 1869 AD, the first issue of Nature Weekly was published.
As one of the most important weekly magazines in the world, this magazine has received extensive attention from scientists. The majority of readers of this magazine are scientists, but the summary of articles at the beginning of the magazine allows the general public to get a glimpse into science. The magazine's editorials, news, and special features cover the most recent news, business conditions, and scientific breakthroughs …
